title: <div>  •  Encourages emotional and intellectual reflection in a flexible way.</d
content:
• Encourages emotional and intellectual reflection in a flexible way.
• Maintains a low-stakes, informal writing space.
• Allows students to engage weekly without feeling forced.

3️⃣ Revised Incentives for Mastery Exam Challenge

📜 Additional Incentives for Mastery Exam Challenge

Students who pass multiple mastery exams unlock:
1. 🏆 Mastery Scholar Status
• Special recognition in the final week.
• A “Mastery Scholar” badge on Canvas.
2. 📚 Alternative Assignments Flexibility
• Students can skip up to 2 traditional assignments (e.g., discussion posts).
3. 🎤 Class Takeover Privilege
• If they score above 95% on multiple exams, they design and lead part of a class discussion.

✅ Why This Works:
• Keeps the challenge competitive while offering real academic benefits.
• Encourages students to take risks in their thinking.
context: From document: Comprehensive Course Structure and Alternating Schedule (A & B Weeks… — chunk 46 (chunk 46/108)
